FileSystemDirectoryHandle-getDirectoryHa.name: getDirectoryHandle(create=false) with a path separator when the directory exists
FileSystemDirectoryHandle-getDirectoryHa.reason: Polyfill throws DOMException instead of TypeError for names containing path separators.

FileSystemDirectoryHandle-getDirectoryHa.name: getDirectoryHandle(create=true) with a path separator
FileSystemDirectoryHandle-getDirectoryHa.reason: Polyfill does not reject names containing path separators with TypeError.

FileSystemDirectoryHandle-getFileHandle..name: getFileHandle(create=false) with a path separator when the file exists.
FileSystemDirectoryHandle-getFileHandle..reason: Polyfill throws DOMException instead of TypeError for names containing path separators.

FileSystemDirectoryHandle-getFileHandle..name: getFileHandle(create=true) with a path separator
FileSystemDirectoryHandle-getFileHandle..reason: Polyfill does not reject names containing path separators with TypeError.

FileSystemDirectoryHandle-removeEntry.js.name: removeEntry() with a path separator should fail.
FileSystemDirectoryHandle-removeEntry.js.reason: Polyfill throws DOMException instead of TypeError for names containing path separators.

FileSystemDirectoryHandle-removeEntry.js.name: removeEntry() while the file has an open writable fails
FileSystemDirectoryHandle-removeEntry.js.reason: Polyfill does not track open writables to block concurrent removal.

FileSystemDirectoryHandle-removeEntry.js.name: removeEntry() of a directory while a containing file has an open writable fails
FileSystemDirectoryHandle-removeEntry.js.reason: Polyfill throws InvalidModificationError instead of NoModificationAllowedError.

FileSystemFileHandle-getFile.js.name: getFile() returns last modified time
FileSystemFileHandle-getFile.js.reason: assert_less_than is not implemented in the Node.js WPT test harness.

FileSystemFileHandle-getFile.js.name: getFile() returns expected name
FileSystemFileHandle-getFile.js.reason: Node.js file adapter does not preserve the original filename in File.name.

FileSystemWritableFileStream.js.name: createWritable() can be called on two handles representing the same file
FileSystemWritableFileStream.js.reason: Test uses getDirectoryHandle on a FileHandle, which is not supported by the polyfill.

FileSystemWritableFileStream-write.js.name: WriteParams: write null data param
FileSystemWritableFileStream-write.js.reason: Memory adapter does not reject null data with TypeError.

FileSystemWritableFileStream-write.js.name: write() with an invalid blob to an empty file should reject
FileSystemWritableFileStream-write.js.reason: Polyfill does not reject invalid blobs with a NotFoundError DOMException.

FileSystemWritableFileStream-write.js.name: an errored writable stream releases its lock
FileSystemWritableFileStream-write.js.reason: Polyfill does not correctly release the stream lock after a write error.

FileSystemWritableFileStream-write.js.name: atomic writes: writable file streams make atomic changes on close
FileSystemWritableFileStream-write.js.reason: Node.js adapter does not fully implement atomic write-on-close semantics.

FileSystemWritableFileStream-piped.js.name: can be piped to with a string
FileSystemWritableFileStream-piped.js.reason: recordingReadableStream is not defined in the Node.js/browser polyfill test environment.

FileSystemWritableFileStream-piped.js.name: can be piped to with an ArrayBuffer
FileSystemWritableFileStream-piped.js.reason: recordingReadableStream is not defined in the Node.js/browser polyfill test environment.

FileSystemWritableFileStream-piped.js.name: can be piped to with a Blob
FileSystemWritableFileStream-piped.js.reason: recordingReadableStream is not defined in the Node.js/browser polyfill test environment.

FileSystemWritableFileStream-piped.js.name: can be piped to with a param object with write command
FileSystemWritableFileStream-piped.js.reason: recordingReadableStream is not defined in the Node.js/browser polyfill test environment.

FileSystemWritableFileStream-piped.js.name: can be piped to with a param object with multiple commands
FileSystemWritableFileStream-piped.js.reason: recordingReadableStream is not defined in the Node.js/browser polyfill test environment.

FileSystemWritableFileStream-piped.js.name: multiple operations can be queued
FileSystemWritableFileStream-piped.js.reason: recordingReadableStream is not defined in the Node.js/browser polyfill test environment.

FileSystemWritableFileStream-piped.js.name: abort() aborts write
FileSystemWritableFileStream-piped.js.reason: Node.js adapter abort behavior differs from the spec.

FileSystemBaseHandle-isSameEntry.js.name: isSameEntry comparing two files pointing to the same path returns true
FileSystemBaseHandle-isSameEntry.js.reason: Memory adapter creates independent handle objects; isSameEntry does not compare by path.

FileSystemBaseHandle-isSameEntry.js.name: isSameEntry comparing two directories pointing to the same path returns true
FileSystemBaseHandle-isSameEntry.js.reason: Memory adapter creates independent handle objects; isSameEntry does not compare by path.
